reasoning: AUDCAD is showing oversold conditions on shorter timeframes (1H, 4H) based on RSI. However, the overall trend on daily and weekly charts suggests a potential downward movement. Monthy RSI is still showing uptrend and price is trading above MA. Taking all this into account, SELL is the more likely option, but BUY is considered due to oversold conditions and monthly uptrend. A HOLD position may be safe until the price further consolidates in order to not generate false signals.
